channel.title: Cariboo Sunday Morning — Cariboo Mix
channel.description: A curated Sunday morning radio experience drawn from CBC cultural podcasts (q with Tom Power, Unreserved), with Canadian indie music transitions from Jamendo. Assembled automatically each Sunday for the Cariboo region of BC.
channel.itunes:author: Cariboo Signals
channel.itunes:summary: A curated Sunday morning radio experience drawn from CBC cultural podcasts (q with Tom Power, Unreserved), with Canadian indie music transitions from Jamendo. Assembled automatically each Sunday for the Cariboo region of BC.

item.title: Cariboo Sunday Morning — March 22, 2026
item.description:
Cariboo Sunday Morning — March 22, 2026

CBC segments featured:

  • Adam Sturgeon on disconnection, reconnection and finding home (Unreserved) — Fri, 20 Mar 2026 22:40:00 EDT

Music:

  • Gates by Bellevue [rock, pop, indie] via Jamendo (CC)

Assembled automatically from CBC Radio podcasts for the Cariboo region of BC. Music sourced from Jamendo under Creative Commons licence.
